opinion.h4: PETERSEN v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 830. Decided June 15, 1959.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Stanley Mosk, Attorney General of California, Clarence A. Linn, Assistant Attorney General, Arlo E. Smith, Deputy Attorney General, Dion Holm and George Baglin for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
ORTEGA v. BIBB, DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 790, Misc. Decided June 15, 1959.
